anomalies.t: Codex engine: 4/4 real runs failed — invalid model gpt-5.5 + OPENAI_API_KEY unset on retry. Yesterday's fix did not stick (model name now gpt-5.5 vs gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07)
Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer single-run cost $8.54 (43% of daily $19.96)
Smoke Pi blocks 100% of network requests (20/20, api-proxy:10002)
PR Sous Chef turn count varies 0-18 (avg 10.5)
Smoke CI agent job cancelled (1/5 runs, ~2m wall)
13 list_issues/search_issues calls filtered by DIFC due to integrity tags
Success rate dropped to 75.6% (was 85.9-92.8% prior 3 days) — driven by codex failures
